mapper.select: SELECT id, circle_id, sender_id, content, msg_type, status, create_time, update_time, is_recalled, deleted_by_admin, deleted_by, deleted_time FROM circle_chat WHERE circle_id = #{circleId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, circle_id, sender_id, content, msg_type, status, create_time, update_time, is_recalled, deleted_by_admin, deleted_by, deleted_time FROM circle_chat WHERE circle_id = #{circleId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, circle_id, sender_id, content, msg_type, status, create_time, update_time, is_recalled, deleted_by_admin, deleted_by, deleted_time FROM circle_chat WHERE id = #{messageId}

SELECT c.id as circle_id, c.name as circle_name, c.avatar as circle_avatar, c.member_count, cc.id as last_message_id, CASE WHEN cc.deleted_by_admin = true THEN '' WHEN cc.is_recalled = true THEN '' ELSE cc.content END as last_message_content, cc.sender_id as last_message_sender_id, u.nickname as last_message_sender_nickname, cc.create_time as last_message_time, COALESCE(uc.unread_count, 0) as unread_count FROM circle c INNER JOIN circle_member cm ON c.id = cm.circle_id AND cm.user_id = #{userId} AND cm.status = 0 LEFT JOIN ( -- 获取每个圈子的最后一条消息（不排除已删除） SELECT DISTINCT ON (circle_id) id, circle_id, sender_id, content, create_time, is_recalled, deleted_by_admin, deleted_by, deleted_time FROM circle_chat ORDER BY circle_id, create_time DESC ) cc ON c.id = cc.circle_id LEFT JOIN users u ON cc.sender_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计每个圈子的未读消息数（基于 circle_member.last_read_time） SELECT cc.circle_id, COUNT(*) as unread_count FROM circle_chat cc INNER JOIN circle_member cm ON cc.circle_id = cm.circle_id AND cm.user_id = #{userId} AND cm.status = 0 WHERE cc.status = 0 AND cc.create_time > cm.last_read_time GROUP BY cc.circle_id ) uc ON c.id = uc.circle_id WHERE c.status = 0 ORDER BY cc.create_time DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM circle_chat cc INNER JOIN circle_member cm ON cc.circle_id = cm.circle_id AND cm.user_id = #{userId} AND cm.status = 0 WHERE cc.circle_id = #{circleId} AND cc.status = 0 AND cc.deleted_by_admin = false AND cc.create_time > cm.last_read_time
